taxonomy.sub_category: BioLite BLXL Solar Kit Updated on December 3, 2024 · Created on July 28, 2017 BioLite BLXL Solar Kit 5W solar charging station. Developed By BioLite Tested By BioLite BLXL Solar Kit Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description The BioLite BLXL Solar Kit is a solar charging station that provides 5W of power for lighting or cell phone charging. It is a kit that includes four separate BioLite products for a fee that is less than the price of the products bought separately. The BaseLantern XL, which comes as part of the kit, is Bluetooth enabled via an iOS or Android app. The app provides the following features: proximity activation, timers and alarms, and full color party mode. Target SDGs SDG 7: Affordable and Clean Energy Market Suggested Retail Price $199.95 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household Distributors / Implementing Organizations Biolite. Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include A-Light S and Barefoot Connect 620 . Regions Europe Countries Canada, United States Manufacturing/Building Method Mass produced Intellectural Property Type Patent User Provision Model For consumers in the United States, Canada and Europe, you can order the Solar Kit online via the BioLite website For other customers, BioLite has partnered with International Checkout to provide fulfillment services. Please refer to International Checkout’s Shipping Policy or email support@bioliteenergy.com Distributions to Date Status Unknown Power rating (W or kW) 5W Battery type Batteries. Battery capacity (mAh) 12000mAh Base Lantern Battery; 2200mAh Solar Panel Batteries. Grid compatibility (yes/no) No Description of mobility Yes Design Specifications The kit comes with the BioLite Baselantern XL, Solar Panel 5+, SiteLight Mini and Dry Bag Product Schematics Technical Support Instruction manual available for the SolarPanel 5+ Replacement Components Yes for the following prices as of July 2017: Base Lantern XL: $160, SolarPanel 5+: $105, SiteLight Mini: $24, Drybag: Free Lifecycle Unknown Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters Base Lantern XL: 500 Lm output, runtime 78 hours low/7.5 hours high, IPX4 water resistance SiteLightMini: 150 Lm output SolarPanel5+: IPX4 water resistance Vetted Performance Status Unknown Safety BaseLantern Safety Information Complementary Technical Systems None Academic Research and References None Compliance with regulations None Evaluation methods Unknown Other Information The BaseLantern XL, which comes as part of the kit, is Bluetooth enabled via an iOS or Android app. The app provides the following features: proximity activation, timers and alarms, and full color party mode.
